requirement_topic.en: EMC — IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-3-2 for PV Inverters — ANM / ARE Framework and Donor-Project Requirements in Benin
requirement_topic.zh: EMC——光伏逆变器IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2——贝宁ANM/ARE框架及捐助方项目要求
requirement_topic.zht: EMC——光伏逆變器IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2——貝寧ANM/ARE框架及捐助方項目要求

summary.en: Benin's ANM (Agence Nationale de Normalisation, de Métrologie et du Contrôle Qualité du Bénin) adopts IEC standards as the reference EMC framework for electrical equipment. For solar PV inverters connected to the Benin grid, the applicable IEC EMC standards are: IEC 62920 (Photovoltaic power generating systems — EMC requirements and test methods for power conversion equipment) and IEC 61000-3-2 (Electromagnetic compatibility — Limits for harmonic current emissions for equipment with input current up to 16 A per phase). No standalone ANM mandatory Technical Regulation specifically for PV inverter EMC has been publicly confirmed as of June 2026; EMC requirements for Benin PV inverters are embedded in the IEC-aligned ANM framework and are explicitly required in donor-funded project (MCC Compact, World Bank) equipment procurement specifications. ARE grid-connection authorisation and SBEE/CEB connection approval implicitly require conformity with IEC EMC standards as part of the broader IEC-based technical acceptance framework for PV inverters.
summary.zh: 贝宁ANM（贝宁国家标准化、计量和质量控制局）采用IEC标准作为电气设备的EMC参考框架。对于接入贝宁电网的太阳能光伏逆变器，适用的IEC EMC标准为：IEC 62920（光伏发电系统——功率变换设备的电磁兼容要求和测试方法）和IEC 61000-3-2（电磁兼容——每相输入电流不超过16 A的设备的谐波电流排放限值）。截至2026年6月，尚无公开确认的专门针对光伏逆变器EMC的独立ANM强制性技术法规；贝宁光伏逆变器的EMC要求包含在ANM的IEC协调框架中，并在捐助方资助项目（MCC Compact、世界银行）设备采购规格中明确规定。ARE并网授权和SBEE/CEB并网审批作为光伏逆变器更广泛的IEC技术准入框架的一部分，隐含要求符合IEC EMC标准。
summary.zht: 貝寧ANM（貝寧國家標準化、計量和質量控制局）採用IEC標準作為電氣設備的EMC參考框架。對於接入貝寧電網的太陽能光伏逆變器，適用的IEC EMC標準為：IEC 62920（光伏發電系統——功率轉換設備的電磁相容要求和測試方法）和IEC 61000-3-2（電磁相容——每相輸入電流不超過16 A的設備的諧波電流排放限值）。截至2026年6月，尚無公開確認的專門針對光伏逆變器EMC的獨立ANM強制性技術法規；貝寧光伏逆變器的EMC要求包含在ANM的IEC協調框架中，並在捐助方資助項目（MCC Compact、世界銀行）設備採購規格中明確規定。ARE併網授權和SBEE/CEB併網審批作為光伏逆變器更廣泛的IEC技術准入框架的一部分，隱含要求符合IEC EMC標準。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62920 — Photovoltaic power generating systems — EMC requirements and test methods for power conversion equipment (IEC standard adopted by ANM as reference)
IEC 61000-3-2 — Electromagnetic compatibility — Limits for harmonic current emissions (equipment with input current up to 16 A per phase) (IEC standard adopted by ANM as reference)
ANM (Agence Nationale de Normalisation, de Métrologie et du Contrôle Qualité du Bénin) — IEC-aligned national conformity framework
ARE (Autorité de Régulation de l'Électricité du Bénin) — grid-connection authorisation (implicitly includes IEC EMC compliance as part of equipment acceptance)

summary.en: Chinese PV inverter EMC is assessed under GB/T 37408-2019 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters), which includes EMC test requirements aligned with China's domestic framework. GB/T 37408 EMC testing is conducted at CNAS-accredited Chinese laboratories. While IEC 62920 draws on IEC 61000-series test methods, the GB/T 37408 EMC test scope and referenced emission limits are not harmonised with IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-3-2 as applied in ANM's IEC-aligned framework. Chinese EMC certificates based solely on GB/T 37408 are not accepted as IEC 62920 or IEC 61000-3-2 compliance evidence for ANM conformity assessment, ARE grid-connection authorisation, or donor-funded project procurement specifications in Benin.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器EMC依据GB/T 37408-2019（光伏并网逆变器技术要求）进行评估，其中包含与中国国内框架相符的EMC测试要求。GB/T 37408 EMC测试在中国CNAS认可实验室进行。尽管IEC 62920借鉴了IEC 61000系列测试方法，但GB/T 37408 EMC测试范围和引用排放限值未与ANM的IEC协调框架所采用的IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2协调。仅基于GB/T 37408的中国EMC证书不被接受为贝宁ANM合格评定、ARE并网授权或捐助方资助项目采购规格的IEC 62920或IEC 61000-3-2合规证据。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器EMC依據GB/T 37408-2019（光伏並網逆變器技術要求）進行評估，其中包含與中國國內框架相符的EMC測試要求。GB/T 37408 EMC測試在中國CNAS認可實驗室進行。儘管IEC 62920借鑑了IEC 61000系列測試方法，但GB/T 37408 EMC測試範圍和引用排放限值未與ANM的IEC協調框架所採用的IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2協調。僅基於GB/T 37408的中國EMC證書不被接受為貝寧ANM合格評定、ARE併網授權或捐助方資助項目採購規格的IEC 62920或IEC 61000-3-2合規證據。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2019 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters) — includes EMC test requirements

gap.en: Gap: Chinese GB/T 37408 EMC testing does not satisfy IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-3-2 evidence requirements under ANM's IEC-aligned framework or donor-funded project procurement specifications for Benin. Exporters should obtain: (a) IEC 62920 EMC type-test report from an ILAC-accredited laboratory for the specific inverter model; (b) IEC 61000-3-2 harmonic current emission test report for the model and power rating. As Benin's grid operates at 220/380 V, 50 Hz — identical to China's GB/T 156 standard voltage — EMC test results obtained under Chinese grid conditions are more likely to be directly applicable in Benin than in markets with different grid voltages (e.g. Qatar's 240/415 V). However, this does not substitute for IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-3-2 type-test reports: the laboratory standard reference and reporting format remain distinct from GB/T 37408.
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T 37408 EMC测试不满足贝宁ANM的IEC协调框架或捐助方资助项目采购规格对IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2证据的要求。出口商应取得：（a）来自ILAC认可实验室、涵盖特定逆变器型号的IEC 62920 EMC型式试验报告；（b）该型号和功率等级的IEC 61000-3-2谐波电流排放测试报告。由于贝宁电网运行于220/380 V、50 Hz——与中国GB/T 156标准电压相同——在中国电网条件下取得的EMC测试结果比在电网电压不同的市场（如卡塔尔240/415 V）中更有可能直接适用于贝宁。但这不能替代IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2型式试验报告：实验室标准参考和报告格式仍与GB/T 37408不同。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T 37408 EMC測試不滿足貝寧ANM的IEC協調框架或捐助方資助項目採購規格對IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2證據的要求。出口商應取得：（a）來自ILAC認可實驗室、涵蓋特定逆變器型號的IEC 62920 EMC型式試驗報告；（b）該型號和功率等級的IEC 61000-3-2諧波電流排放測試報告。由於貝寧電網運行於220/380 V、50 Hz——與中國GB/T 156標準電壓相同——在中國電網條件下取得的EMC測試結果比在電網電壓不同的市場（如卡達240/415 V）中更有可能直接適用於貝寧。但這不能替代IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2型式試驗報告：實驗室標準參考和報告格式仍與GB/T 37408不同。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in practice for donor-funded project procurement (MCC, World Bank, AFD) and ANM conformity assessment; de facto prerequisite for ARE grid-connection authorisation under the IEC-aligned regulatory framework; no standalone confirmed mandatory ANM Technical Regulation specifically for PV inverter EMC identified as of June 2026 (verify with ANM directly)
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary — GB/T 37408 EMC testing is a requirement for voluntary CQC/CGC certification; not a standalone mandatory market-access requirement for domestic China PV inverters

source.publisher: ANM — Agence Nationale de Normalisation, de Métrologie et du Contrôle Qualité du Bénin

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T 37408 EMC certificates do not satisfy IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-3-2 requirements under ANM's IEC-aligned framework or donor-funded project procurement specifications for Benin. Obtain IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-3-2 type-test reports from an ILAC-accredited laboratory for the specific inverter model. Because Benin's grid voltage (220/380 V, 50 Hz) matches China's GB/T 156 standard voltage, EMC test conditions are broadly compatible — but the IEC laboratory standard reference and reporting format must be IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-3-2, not GB/T 37408. Verify current ANM conformity requirements and ARE/SBEE grid-connection EMC acceptance criteria directly with ANM and ARE before finalising the equipment compliance package.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T 37408 EMC证书不满足贝宁ANM的IEC协调框架或捐助方资助项目采购规格对IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2的要求。须从ILAC认可实验室取得特定逆变器型号的IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2型式试验报告。由于贝宁电网电压（220/380 V、50 Hz）与中国GB/T 156标准电压一致，EMC测试条件大体兼容——但实验室标准参考和报告格式须为IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2，而非GB/T 37408。在最终确定设备合规包前，请直接向ANM和ARE核实现行ANM合格要求及ARE/SBEE并网EMC准入标准。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T 37408 EMC證書不滿足貝寧ANM的IEC協調框架或捐助方資助項目採購規格對IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2的要求。須從ILAC認可實驗室取得特定逆變器型號的IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2型式試驗報告。由於貝寧電網電壓（220/380 V、50 Hz）與中國GB/T 156標準電壓一致，EMC測試條件大體相容——但實驗室標準參考和報告格式須為IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2，而非GB/T 37408。在最終確定設備合規包前，請直接向ANM和ARE核實現行ANM合格要求及ARE/SBEE併網EMC准入標準。
